use_cases: Mobile app navigation with tab-based selection for dashboard-style interfaces
Fintech apps with portfolio tracking and transaction management
E-commerce apps with cart, orders, and profile sections
Social/communication apps with messaging and notifications
General mobile-first web applications requiring persistent bottom navigation
ai_summary: A polished mobile bottom navigation bar component with tab-style navigation featuring Lucide icons and Framer Motion animations. Supports active state indicators, sticky positioning, and touch-friendly tap targets. Ideal for mobile-first applications like fintech dashboards, e-commerce apps, and social platforms requiring persistent bottom navigation with smooth micro-interactions.
